Usage: heyfood login [OPTIONS]

 Authenticate this machine with HelloFood.

╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --api-url           TEXT     Override the active context API URL.                                                    │
│ --auth-url          TEXT     Override the active context auth URL.                                                   │
│ --api-key           TEXT     API key for first-party app session refresh.                                            │
│ --local                      Use the local Docker dev URLs.                                                          │
│ --device                     Use short-code login for SSH/headless systems.                                          │
│ --no-browser                 Print the login URL instead of opening a browser.                                       │
│ --timeout           INTEGER  Seconds to wait for browser callback. [default: 180]                                    │
│ --help                       Show this message and exit.                                                             │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
